name: Jeb Bush Jr.
subject: Where are you?
body:
Friend,

For the past few weeks I have been traveling the country with dad and I can tell you firsthand he's excited.

He's excited about getting on the trail and hearing from voters from all over this country. He's excited about sharing his vision with you, winning your support and getting you involved in the campaign. But mostly, he's excited about winning in 2016 and working together to fix this country.

It's hard to believe, but it's almost been one full month since the race began. That's why I'm emailing today. At midnight on July 15 we officially will have been in the race for one full month, and with it, we'll be capping our Founding Member program.

[**This is your last chance to be a Founding Member of the next President of the United States ' campaign, and all you have to do is chip in $100, $50, $25.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rclfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbswncj_mdbnnspw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Thousands of voters from every state in the country have already stepped up and claimed their Founding Member status in my dad's campaign, but I see you haven't.

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/bldkvjzmbqgydndpyjtkbysnzzysmnvmkjcjgmnbfpp_mdbnnspw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[**With our crucial First Month deadline just 3 days away, will you join the thousands already and become a Founding Member now?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/jrbhctnkfmvwspsbwtdhfwzpnnwzkpckhtqtvkpfjbr_mdbnnspw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Your early investment in my dad will allow him to bring his positive, conservative vision for this country to every state, and will help make sure he has the resources he needs to take on the Clinton Machine and win!

Friend, I wouldn't be asking if this deadline wasn't so important. Please, become a Founding Member of the winning team today: [**Jeb2016.com/Founding-Member**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/essljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwcpyry_mdbnnspw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Thank you, and I look forward to seeing you on the trail!

Jeb Jr.

[**P.S. An opportunity to become a Founding Member of the next President 's organization doesn't come along every day--don't miss out, chip in $25 now to get in on the ground floor.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/esyljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwcpyrt_mdbnnspw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ylfryfvtcgknmwmsnfzrcnpwvvnptwytrfbfktwcqsk_mdbnnspw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=1217&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: elizabethforrand2016@gmail.com
subject: Is Rand on his own?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Rand asked me to make sure you had a chance to read his email from Thursday.

He is proposing legislation that will turn off the flow of taxpayer money to sanctuary cities that refuse to enforce immigration laws.

**[Please take a few moments to read his email below and add your name to Stand with Rand to end sanctuary cities](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29010892:27849015918:m:1:879035888:7737AC2D2C4150CC5DC0A28C71D3D0D4:r)**.

In Liberty,

Elizabeth

* * *

**From** : Rand Paul [Rand.Paul@randpaul2016.com]
**To** : Fellow Conservative [dpwillis67@gmail.com]
**Subject** : Am I on my own, Fellow Conservative?
Fellow Conservative:

I'm ready to play hardball.

On Fox News' _On the Record_ , I announced I will introduce legislation this week to cut off ALL federal taxpayer funding for so-called "sanctuary cities" \-- until they start abiding by federal law.

If you have my back in this critical fight, I need to know right away.

**[Will you please fill out your"Enforce Immigration Law" petition IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29010892:27849015918:m:1:879035888:7737AC2D2C4150CC5DC0A28C71D3D0D4:r)**?

For taking this stand, I know I'm going to be attacked like never before.

But I think it's high time someone did something!

The truth is, for years politicians in BOTH parties have promised you and me secure borders.

But all we have to show for those promises is sheer lawlessness.

This President has time and again sought to go around Congress with illegal and unconstitutional executive actions regarding immigration.

And now many American cities are following in lockstep in open defiance of federal law!

These so-called "sanctuary cities" prohibit the use of funds to enforce federal immigration law, usually banning officers from even asking about a person's immigration status.

These cities become magnets for illegal immigrant criminals and gang members who have been deported multiple times, but know they're safe if they can just stay within a city's borders.

This can't be allowed to stand.

Not when we know terrorist organizations are looking at our porous southern border as a way to gain entry into the United States.

Not if we are to save the concept of rule by law.

My bill would end all federal taxpayer funding for these cities until they start ENFORCING federal immigration law.

I know these cities will shriek and moan that there shouldn't be any strings attached to all of your tax dollars.

They'll say they're entitled to pick and choose what laws they recognize.

And you can bet our national media will be on their side, and come after me with everything they have.

But Fellow Conservative, it's time politicians cared more about keeping their promises to the American people than what our national media says.

If you agree, I need to hear from you right away.

**[Please sign your"Enforce Immigration Law" petition and agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29010892:27849015918:m:1:879035888:7737AC2D2C4150CC5DC0A28C71D3D0D4:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29010893:27849015918:m:1:879035888:7737AC2D2C4150CC5DC0A28C71D3D0D4:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29010894:27849015918:m:1:879035888:7737AC2D2C4150CC5DC0A28C71D3D0D4:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29010895:27849015918:m:1:879035888:7737AC2D2C4150CC5DC0A28C71D3D0D4:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29010896:27849015918:m:1:879035888:7737AC2D2C4150CC5DC0A28C71D3D0D4:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29010892:27849015918:m:1:879035888:7737AC2D2C4150CC5DC0A28C71D3D0D4:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29010897:27849015918:m:1:879035888:7737AC2D2C4150CC5DC0A28C71D3D0D4:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29010898:27849015918:m:1:879035888:7737AC2D2C4150CC5DC0A28C71D3D0D4:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29010899:27849015918:m:1:879035888:7737AC2D2C4150CC5DC0A28C71D3D0D4:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
